Custom Roll Labels

Professional Roll Labels for Product Branding & Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Choose Your Roll Label Material Select Roll Label Shape Upload Your Design Preview Your Roll Labels Add to Cart Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Roll Labels for Product Branding & Packaging

Custom roll labels from Decals.com provide the perfect solution for professional product branding and packaging applications. Our premium roll labels stick securely to smooth, non-porous surfaces including glass, plastic, metal, and cardboard, making them ideal for bottles, jars, boxes, and retail packaging. See also [shape cut labels](https://www.decals.com/labels/business-labels/shape-cut-labels).

Available in waterproof BOPP material and economical paper options, our roll labels deliver exceptional print quality with your custom designs. Choose from four popular shapes - circle, square, rectangle, and oval - with glossy or matte finishes to match your brand aesthetic. Whether you need durable shape cut labels for food and beverage products or cost-effective paper labels for retail applications, we provide tailored solutions that help your products stand out.

Perfect for businesses in food service, retail, manufacturing, and e-commerce, our roll labels combine professional appearance with reliable adhesion. Each label is printed with fade-resistant inks and precision-cut for consistent application, ensuring your brand maintains a polished look across all your products.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Customize Your Roll Labels

Creating custom roll labels with Decals.com is straightforward and flexible. Our design process accommodates businesses of all sizes, from small startups to large manufacturers requiring high-volume roll label production.

Design Process

Start by selecting your preferred roll label material - waterproof BOPP for durability or paper for cost-effectiveness. Choose from circle, square, rectangle, or oval shapes, then upload your artwork using our online design tool. Our system accepts various file formats and provides real-time previews of your roll labels before production.

Proof Approval

Every roll label order includes a complimentary digital proof showing exactly how your labels will appear when printed. Review colors, text placement, and overall design quality before approving production. Our in-house design team can assist with adjustments to ensure your roll labels meet professional standards.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your roll label order from design approval through shipping with our proprietary tracking system. Receive updates at each production stage, including proof approval, printing, cutting, and packaging, so you know exactly when to expect delivery.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label Production & Turnaround Times

Our roll label production begins once you approve your digital proof. Standard production turnaround ensures your custom roll labels ship within three business days of approval, with expedited options available for urgent projects.

Standard Production

Standard roll label production takes 3 business days from proof approval to shipping. This timeline includes printing, precision cutting, quality inspection, and packaging of your custom roll labels.

Rush Production Options

Need your roll labels faster? We offer expedited production for time-sensitive projects. Rush production reduces standard turnaround while maintaining the same quality standards for print clarity and cut precision.

Production time is separate from shipping time. Once your roll labels complete production, shipping time depends on your selected delivery method. Consider both production and shipping timelines when planning your project delivery date.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label Material & Cut Options

Choose from premium roll label materials designed for different applications and budgets. Each material offers specific benefits for various industries and use cases.

Waterproof BOPP Roll Labels

Made from biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP), these roll labels are completely waterproof and resistant to oils, chemicals, and food acids. The synthetic material is non-toxic and food-safe, making waterproof roll labels perfect for beverage bottles, food containers, and products exposed to moisture. Available in clear and white finishes.

Paper Roll Labels

Paper roll labels provide an economical solution for high-volume applications and short-term labeling needs. These labels offer excellent print quality at a lower cost point, making them ideal for retail packaging, shipping labels, and temporary promotional materials. Available in multiple shapes with glossy or matte finishes.

Shape Options

All roll label materials are available in four popular shapes: circle, square, rectangle, and oval. Each shape can be customized to your specific size requirements within our production capabilities. For specialized shapes, consider our shape cut labels for unique branding applications.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork setup ensures your roll labels print with optimal quality and color accuracy. Follow these guidelines to achieve professional results with your custom roll label designs.

Preferred File Types

Vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) produce the highest quality roll labels with crisp text and clean graphics. These formats maintain quality at any size and ensure sharp printing results.

High-Resolution Raster Files

When vector files aren't available, submit high-resolution raster images (PNG, JPG, TIFF) at 300 DPI minimum. Ensure images are sized appropriately for your final roll label dimensions to prevent pixelation.

Color Considerations

Design your roll labels using CMYK color mode for print accuracy. RGB colors may appear differently when printed. For waterproof roll labels on clear material, ensure sufficient contrast between text and background elements for optimal readability.

Text and Font Guidelines

Convert all fonts to outlines or curves before submitting artwork. Use font sizes of 8pt or larger to ensure legibility on your finished roll labels. Consider how text will appear on your chosen material - white text works well on clear labels over dark products.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label Shipping & Delivery

Your custom roll labels ship carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. We use reliable carriers to ensure your labels arrive in perfect condition and ready for application.

Shipping Methods

Standard shipping via FedEx Ground delivers most roll label orders within 3-5 business days after production completion. Expedited shipping options including 2-day and overnight delivery are available for time-sensitive projects.

Packaging Protection

Roll labels are packaged in protective materials to prevent moisture damage and physical harm during shipping. Labels remain on their backing material and are secured in rigid packaging to maintain flat, wrinkle-free condition.

Shipping Timeline Expectations

Total delivery time includes both production time (3 business days standard) plus shipping time based on your selected method. Track your roll label shipment from our facility to your door using the provided tracking number.

Important Shipping Notes

Roll labels ship from our Minnesota facility. Delivery times may vary based on destination and weather conditions. For large volume orders or special packaging requirements, contact our customer service team for customized shipping solutions.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label Installation Guide

Proper application ensures your roll labels adhere securely and maintain professional appearance throughout their intended lifespan. Follow these steps for optimal results with both waterproof and paper roll labels.

Surface Preparation

Clean application surfaces thoroughly with alcohol or degreasing solution to remove dirt, oils, and residue. Ensure surfaces are completely dry before applying roll labels. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, plastic, and metal provide the best adhesion.

Label Application Process

Remove roll labels from backing material carefully to avoid stretching or damage. Position labels accurately before initial contact - repositioning may reduce adhesive strength. Apply firm, even pressure from center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure complete contact.

Achieving Professional Results

For curved surfaces like bottles, apply roll labels gradually while maintaining tension to prevent wrinkles. Use a squeegee or credit card to smooth labels during application. Allow 24 hours for full adhesive cure, especially for waterproof roll labels in challenging environments.

Temperature Considerations

Apply roll labels at room temperature for best results. Cold temperatures may reduce initial adhesive tack, while excessive heat can make labels difficult to position. Store unused roll labels in moderate temperature conditions to maintain adhesive performance.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Roll Labels?

Roll labels are custom-printed adhesive labels supplied on continuous rolls for efficient application to products, packaging, and containers. Made from materials like waterproof BOPP vinyl or paper, roll labels feature pressure-sensitive adhesives that bond securely to smooth, non-porous surfaces including glass, plastic, metal, and cardboard. Common applications include product branding, ingredient labeling, promotional messaging, and package identification across industries like food and beverage, retail, manufacturing, and e-commerce.

Order Your Custom Roll Labels Today

Ready to enhance your product packaging with professional roll labels? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to design, proof, and receive high-quality custom roll labels for your business needs. With waterproof and paper material options, multiple shapes, and fast turnaround times, Decals.com delivers the roll label solutions that help your products stand out in competitive markets.

Upload your design, select your specifications, and let our experienced team handle the rest. From small businesses launching new products to established companies refreshing their brand presentation, we provide the expertise and quality that ensure your roll labels make the right impression. Consider pairing your roll labels with our rectangle label sheets for additional packaging solutions.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Roll Label FAQs

What surfaces work best for roll labels?

Roll labels adhere best to smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, plastic, metal, aluminum, and coated cardboard. These surfaces provide optimal adhesion for both waterproof BOPP and paper roll labels, ensuring long-lasting application.

How long do waterproof roll labels last outdoors?

Waterproof BOPP roll labels typically last 3-5 years outdoors when applied to appropriate surfaces. Their resistance to moisture, oils, and UV exposure makes them suitable for products stored in challenging environments or exposed to weather conditions.

What is the difference between waterproof and paper roll labels?

Waterproof roll labels use synthetic BOPP material that resists moisture, chemicals, and food acids, making them ideal for beverage and food applications. Paper roll labels offer economical printing for short-term or high-volume applications where moisture resistance isn't critical.

Can I get roll labels in custom shapes?

Standard roll labels are available in circle, square, rectangle, and oval shapes. For unique shapes beyond these options, consider our shape cut labels which offer more complex die-cutting capabilities for specialized branding needs.

What file format should my roll label artwork be?

Vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) produce the highest quality roll labels with crisp text and graphics. High-resolution raster files (PNG, JPG) at 300 DPI minimum are acceptable alternatives when vector files aren't available.

Do roll labels work on curved surfaces like bottles?

Yes, roll labels conform well to curved surfaces when applied properly. Waterproof BOPP material offers excellent flexibility for bottle applications, while proper application technique ensures smooth, wrinkle-free results on cylindrical containers.

How are roll labels packaged for shipping?

Roll labels ship on their backing material in protective packaging to prevent damage during transit. Labels remain flat and ready for application, with rigid packaging ensuring they arrive in perfect condition for immediate use.
